name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: Website Audit Request
prompts.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and provide a detailed report on its marketing effectiveness.
prompts.use_case: Marketing teams requiring automated multi-channel campaign creation.

prompts.name: Generate Marketing Copy
prompts.template: Create compelling marketing copy for a {product_service_info} targeting {target_audience} with the goal of {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Agencies needing fast website audits and client-ready reports.

prompts.name: Email Sequence Generator
prompts.template: Develop an email marketing sequence for {product_service_info} to engage {target_audience} aimed at {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Businesses optimizing marketing strategies with AI-generated content.

prompts.name: Ad Campaign Planner
prompts.template: Design an ad campaign blueprint leveraging {campaign_parameters} for marketing {product_service_info} to {target_audience}.
prompts.use_case: Competitive benchmarking and intelligence gathering for marketing decisions.

prompts.name: Competitive Intelligence Report
prompts.template: Analyze competitors relevant to {product_service_info} and summarize findings in a client-ready report.
prompts.use_case: Generating comprehensive marketing plans including copy, emails, ads, and calendars.
